title: Trane Technologies to Present at the Morgan Stanley Laguna Conference
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, today announced that company leadership will participate in a fireside chat at the Morgan Stanley Laguna Conference. They will speak at 10:30 a.m. PT on Wednesday, September 14, 2022. The live webcast will be accessible on the Trane Technologies website at www.tranetechnologies.com under the investor relations section. An archive of the webcast will be available for 30 days following the event. Abou

title: 2 Industrial Stocks to Buy Before the Bear Market Is Over
text: Industrial stocks can be some of the hardest hit during a bear market. They can also be the best performers in an ensuing bull market.

title: Trane Technologies Appoints Dwayne Cowan as President of Thermo King EMEA and Global Marine, Rail and Air Business
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies (NYSE: TT), a global climate innovator, today announced that Dwayne Cowan has been appointed as president of Thermo King Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA) and Global Marine, Air and Rail, effective August 1. title: Trane Technologies (TT) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Up Y/Y
text: Trane Technologies' (TT) second-quarter 2022 earnings and revenues improved year over year.

title: Trane Technologies (TT) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Trane Technologies (TT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.86% and 1.17%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Trane Technologies Reports Record Second-Quarter 2022 Results; Raises Full-Year Revenue and EPS Guidance
text: SWORDS, Ireland--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, today reported diluted earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations of $2.17 for the second quarter of 2022. Adjusted continuing EPS was $2.16, up 13 percent, which excludes a net gain of $3.3 million related primarily to non-cash adjustments, transformation and other restructuring costs.
